Thanks for contributing! Please keep PRs small and focused — one logical

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo test` passes (from `src-tauri/`).
- [ ] `npm run build` produces no TypeScript errors.
- [ ] Manually verified in `npm run tauri dev` on my own AMD GPU.

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow the `type: subject` style
      (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `chore:`, `perf:`).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if the change is
      user-visible.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added, or the rationale is explained
      below.
- [ ] The change stays within the project scope (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
